original_thesis: A negative lollapalooza — the self-reinforcing trap of motivated reasoning. Cognitive dissonance creates discomfort; rationalization resolves it by rewriting the story; confirmation bias selects supporting evidence; status-quo bias resists change. The result: a person or organization that cannot recognize they are wrong because each mechanism feeds the next. This is the internal cousin of the Fast Thinking Failure Cascade.
what_this_stack_defeats: Nothing — this IS the failure mode. Counter: Epistemic Hygiene + Structured Rigor.
notes: Structural family (negative lollapalooza). Density 0.0 because these reinforce through tension/antagonist edges, not ally edges. The reinforcement chain is real: dissonance → rationalization → confirmation-bias → status-quo-bias. Relationship to Fast Thinking Failure Cascade: FTFC is externally-triggered (bad inputs), self-deception is internally-triggered (ego protection).
